tluaColonCallErrors.tlua(15,7): error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number'.
tluaColonCallErrors.tlua(19,3): error TLUA2554: Expected 2 arguments, but got 1.
tluaColonCallErrors.tlua(20,10): error TLUA2554: Expected 2 arguments, but got 3.
tluaColonCallErrors.tlua(32,1): error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'Mislabeled' is not assignable to parameter of type 'Counter'.
  Types of property 'count' are incompatible.
    Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
tluaColonCallErrors.tlua(36,12): error TLUA2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 2.
tluaColonCallErrors.tlua(39,5): error TLUA2349: This expression is not callable.
  Type 'String' has no call signatures.
tluaColonCallErrors.tlua(42,3): error TLUA2339: Property 'absent' does not exist on type '{ count: number; inc(self: any, by: number): number; }'.


==== tluaColonCallErrors.tlua (7 errors) ====
    local M = { count = 0 };
    
    function M:inc(by: number): number
      self.count = self.count + by;
      return self.count;
    end
    
    interface Ops {
      noSelf(a: number): number;
      tag: string;
    }
    declare ops: Ops;
    
    // Wrong argument type.
    M:inc("x");
          ~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number'.
    
    // Arity: the receiver fills the first parameter, so one explicit argument is
    // expected here.
    M:inc();
      ~~~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 2 arguments, but got 1.
!!! related TLUA6210 tluaColonCallErrors.tlua:3:16: An argument for 'by' was not provided.
    M:inc(1, 2);
             ~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 2 arguments, but got 3.
    
    // The receiver is checked against the declared self parameter, and the error
    // lands on the receiver.
    interface Counter {
      count: number;
    }
    interface Mislabeled {
      count: string;
      bump(self: Counter, by: number): number;
    }
    declare mislabeled: Mislabeled;
    mislabeled:bump(1);
    ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'Mislabeled' is not assignable to parameter of type 'Counter'.
!!! error TLUA2345:   Types of property 'count' are incompatible.
!!! error TLUA2345:     Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    
    // A member that does not take the receiver as its first parameter rejects the
    // colon form's receiver argument.
    ops:noSelf(1);
               ~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 2.
    
    // Colon-calling a non-function member.
    ops:tag();
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2349: This expression is not callable.
!!! error TLUA2349:   Type 'String' has no call signatures.
    
    // Colon-calling an unknown member.
    M:absent();
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'absent' does not exist on type '{ count: number; inc(self: any, by: number): number; }'.
